category.scope_note: GaN fast charger and external power adapter comparison for consumer and commercial USB-C power-supply products.

title.en: China-to-US GaN Fast Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国氮化镓快充充电器进入美国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國氮化鎵快充充電器進入美國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China GaN fast charger documentation against US UL/NRTL, FCC, DoE external-power-supply efficiency, California CEC, and USB-C interoperability expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国氮化镓快充充电器文件与美国 UL/NRTL、FCC、DoE 外部电源能效、加州 CEC 和 USB-C 互操作要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國氮化鎵快充充電器文件與美國 UL/NRTL、FCC、DoE 外部電源能效、加州 CEC 和 USB-C 互操作要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NRTL assessment, FCC equipment-authorization determination, energy-efficiency approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current US federal, state, listing, FCC, DoE, California CEC, labelling, and retail requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or sale.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NRTL 评审、FCC 设备授权裁定、能效批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或销售前应与合格专业人士核验现行美国联邦、州、列名、FCC、DoE、加州 CEC、标签和零售要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NRTL 評審、FCC 設備授權裁定、能效批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或銷售前應與合格專業人士核驗現行美國聯邦、州、列名、FCC、DoE、加州 CEC、標籤和零售要求。

answer_first.en: UL 62368-1 NRTL listing plus FCC Part 15 plus DoE Level VI external-power-supply efficiency plus California CEC registration are the gaps vs Chinese GB.
answer_first.zh: 相较于中国 GB，美国主要差距是 UL 62368-1 NRTL 列名、FCC Part 15、DoE Level VI 外部电源能效，以及加州 CEC 注册。
answer_first.zht: 相較於中國 GB，美國主要差距是 UL 62368-1 NRTL 列名、FCC Part 15、DoE Level VI 外部電源能效，以及加州 CEC 註冊。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, NRTL, energy authority, customs, market-surveillance authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
